# Taxi B&B GmbH

Taxi B&B GmbH is a licensed taxi and passenger transport company based in Essen, Germany (founded 1992). The company offers local and long-distance taxi rides, airport transfers, medical transport (Krankenfahrten), dialysis transport, courier services, and large-capacity rides (up to 7 passengers) for private and business customers in the Ruhr region.

## Canonical Domain

https://taxibbessen.de

## Language & Market

- Primary language: German (de-DE)
- Market: Essen, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany
- Service area: Essen and surrounding Ruhr region; also nationwide and European long-distance

## Key Pages

- Homepage & booking: https://taxibbessen.de/
- Fleet / vehicles: https://taxibbessen.de/fahrzeuge
- About us: https://taxibbessen.de/ueber-uns
- Book a ride: https://taxibbessen.de/book

## Service Pages

- Airport transfer Essen–Düsseldorf: https://taxibbessen.de/flughafentransfer-essen-duesseldorf
- Medical transport (Krankenfahrten): https://taxibbessen.de/krankenfahrten-essen
- Large taxi (Großraumtaxi, 7 persons): https://taxibbessen.de/grossraumtaxi-essen
- Dialysis transport (Dialysefahrten): https://taxibbessen.de/dialysefahrten-essen
- Courier service (Kurierdienst): https://taxibbessen.de/kurierdienst-essen
- Taxi at Essen main station (HBF): https://taxibbessen.de/taxi-essen-hbf

## District / Area Pages

- Taxi in Essen-Holsterhausen: https://taxibbessen.de/taxi-essen-holsterhausen
- Taxi in Essen-Rüttenscheid: https://taxibbessen.de/taxi-essen-ruettenscheid
- Taxi in Essen-Frohnhausen: https://taxibbessen.de/taxi-essen-frohnhausen
- Taxi in Essen-Südviertel: https://taxibbessen.de/taxi-essen-suedviertel

- Legal notice (Impressum): https://taxibbessen.de/impressum
